info.title: CSV Converter by Power2Apps
info.description: Converts between all common tabular (CSV, Excel, HTML table) and hierarchical (JSON, XML, YAML) data formats. The main action auto-detects the input and returns all supported formats in one step. Additional actions enable targeted conversions with advanced options. Supports flexible, reliable bidirectional format conversion for automation scenarios.

post.description: Convert data between multiple formats including CSV, JSON, HTML, Excel, XML, and YAML with a single powerful action - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a CSV to a JSON - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a JSON to a CSV - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a CSV to a Excel file - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a Excel file to a CSV - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a CSV to a HTML table - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a HTML table to a CSV - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a CSV to a XML - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a XML to a CSV - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a CSV to a YAML - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a YAML to a CSV - https://converter.power2apps.com
Convert a CSV to a Text Table - https://converter.power2apps.com

outputFormat.description: Limit output formats to improve performance. E.g. 'CSV, JSON, Excel'. Blank = all

autoDetectHeaderLine.description: Automatically detect the header line based on content. Default = true

headerLineIndex.description: Use specific row index as header. Ignored if Auto-detect is true. Default = 0

detectionAccuracy.description: Scans rows to detect headers and formats — more rows improve accuracy. Default = 'Fast'

nullValue.description: Treats this value (e.g. '-', 'N/A') as null (if Auto-detect field type is true). Default = empty

skipRows.description: Skip a range or specific rows e.g.: '2-5', '2', '2,4'.

skipLast.description: Stop at a specific row number. Default = convert all rows

quoteCharacter.description: Character used to quote values. Default = '"'

escapeCharacter.description: Character used to escape special characters. Default = '\'

autoDetectWrappedLines.description: Try to detect and unwrap multi-line values. Default = true

columnRenames.description: Use 'Old=New' pairs, separated by ';'. Example: OrderID=ID;Total=Amount

columnsToInclude.description: Comma-separated list of columns to include e.g.: OrderID,Total. Empty = all
